info.title: Iron Cannon MCP HTTP API
info.description: HTTP bridge for MCP tools. Primary integrators use POST /mcp (JSON-RPC). Legacy body { toolId } supported. Examples: docs/engine/mcp-clients/golden-path-rpc-examples.json

post.summary: Stripe platform billing webhooks (Iron Cannon subscriptions)
post.description: Requires STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Returns 501 when secret unset. Verifies Stripe-Signature header.

post.summary: MCP JSON-RPC or legacy tool invoke

200.description: JSON-RPC result or legacy tool payload

T01.description: Detect frontend, database, and service stack from project files (local discovery).

fixtureId.description: Stack detection fixture id (e.g. SD-01) for local test harness.

projectRoot.description: Absolute path to project root for live discovery (optional).

T02.description: Validate detected stack is complete and supported for Iron Cannon golden flows.

T03.description: Generate auth + billing wiremap and issue wiremapAttestation for later module calls.

flowIds.description: Flow ids to compose into wiremap.

T04.description: Compose tier-redacted module directives for one wiremap module (requires wiremapAttestation).

completedModules.description: Module ids already verified in order.

wiremapAttestation.description: Wiremap attestation object from T03 (required after wiremap approval).

T05.description: Verify module source against compliance patterns; returns compliant true/false (requires wiremapAttestation).

moduleId.description: Module id to verify against fixture patterns.

snippet.description: Source code excerpt to verify (optional; uses fixture pass snippet if omitted).

wiremapAttestation.description: Wiremap attestation object from T03 (required after wiremap approval).

T06.description: Continuous diff check — compare state_log, disk files, and stack signals for drift.

diskFiles.description: Map of relative path → file hash or excerpt.

stackSignals.description: Optional fresh stack signals from T01.

T07.description: Audit a failed user flow — map symptoms and logs to recovery steps.

errorLog.description: Error log or stack trace excerpt.

T08.description: Rollback to a prior module boundary using state_log snapshot (destructive — confirm first).

moduleId.description: Module boundary to roll back to.

T09.description: Map vulnerability surfaces and infrastructure domains for Armor hardening.

includeInfrastructure.description: Include INFRA-* domains in response (default true).

T10.description: Security or infrastructure directives for a surfaceId (SURF-*) or domainId (INFRA-*).

productionMode.description: When true, omit dev-relaxed security patterns.

expectedRps.description: Peak requests per second for scale directives.

expectedUsers.description: Expected user scale for capacity planning.

T11.description: Production readiness gate: security checklist + infrastructure scale (requires wiremapAttestation).

wiremapContext.description: Object with completedModules array from golden path.

confirmedChecklistIds.description: Infra checklist item ids user confirmed manually.

autoConfirmInfra.description: Auto-confirm infra items tied to completed modules (default true).

wiremapAttestation.description: Wiremap attestation object from T03 (required after wiremap approval).

T12.description: Map legal/compliance obligations by primary market (IronClad — not legal advice).

primaryMarkets.description: Market codes: us, eu, uk, ca, etc.

T13.description: Compliance directive for one obligationId; optional snippet for automated detect.

snippet.description: Code or template excerpt to run obligation detect against.

T14.description: Legal readiness advisory — confirm reviewed obligation IDs (IronClad — not legal advice).

primaryMarkets.description: Markets in scope for readiness audit.
